sections.sectionTitle: Pasian, Mite A Huh, A Lianpa

verses.text: Topa phat un. Ke'n, Topa ka phat ding hi
Ka hin' laiteng Topa ka phat ding a, ka nuntak laiteng ka Pasian' tungah phatnate ka sa ding hi
Huhna a hong pia theilo uliante ahi a, mi mawkmawkte ahi zongin muang kei un
A husan'na a bei ciangin lei-ah ciahkik uh a, tua ni mahmahin a ngaihsutnate uh beita hi
Jakob' Pasian pen amah huhpa hi-in, ama Topa Pasian a muang mipa mi lungdam ahi hi
Amah in van leh lei, tuipi leh tuate sungah a om khempeuh bawl a, a tawntungin thuman hi
A kinengniam mite-a' dingin thumanna semkhia a, gilkialte an a vak hi. Topa in thongkiate a khahkhia hi
Topa in mittawte khua a musak hi. Topa in niamsakna a thuak mite sangtosak a, Topa in thuman mite a it hi
Topa in peemtate kem a, meigong numeite leh pa neilote a huh hi. Ahih hangin amah in migilote' vaihawmna a suksiatsak hi
Zion aw, nangma Pasian Topa in khang tawntungin uk ding hi. Topa phat un.
